---
title: "Packages"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.package-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 20px;
  margin: 24px 0 40px;
}
.package-card {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  text-align: center;
  gap: 10px;
  background-color: #ffffff;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 24px 20px;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.05);
  border-left: 4px solid #4c5f75;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: all 0.3s ease;
}
.package-card:hover {
  box-shadow: 0 5px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1);
  transform: translateY(-2px);
}
.package-card-img {
  height: 100px;
  width: auto;
}
.package-card-icon {
  height: 100px;
  width: 100px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
}
.package-card-title {
  font-weight: bold;
  font-size: 1.05rem;
  color: #212529;
}
.package-card-desc {
  color: #555;
  font-size: 0.9em;
  line-height: 1.4;
}
.package-card-more .package-card-title,
.package-card-more .package-card-desc {
  color: #4c5f75;
}
.package-card-more svg {
  color: #4c5f75;
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div class="package-grid">
  <a class="package-card" href="https://github.com/dylanpieper/redquack" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <img src="media/redquack-hex.png" alt="redquack hex logo" class="package-card-img">
    <span class="package-card-title">redquack</span>
    <span class="package-card-desc">Transfer REDCap data to a database and use in R without exceeding available memory</span>
  </a>
  <a class="package-card package-card-more" href="https://github.com/dylanpieper" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
    <span class="package-card-icon">
      <svg width="48" height="48" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="currentColor"><path d="M8 0C3.58 0 0 3.58 0 8c0 3.54 2.29 6.53 5.47 7.59.4.07.55-.17.55-.38 0-.19-.01-.82-.01-1.49-2.01.37-2.53-.49-2.69-.94-.09-.23-.48-.94-.82-1.13-.28-.15-.68-.52-.01-.53.63-.01 1.08.58 1.23.82.72 1.21 1.87.87 2.33.66.07-.52.28-.87.51-1.07-1.78-.2-3.64-.89-3.64-3.95 0-.87.31-1.59.82-2.15-.08-.2-.36-1.02.08-2.12 0 0 .67-.21 2.2.82.64-.18 1.32-.27 2-.27.68 0 1.36.09 2 .27 1.53-1.04 2.2-.82 2.2-.82.44 1.1.16 1.92.08 2.12.51.56.82 1.27.82 2.15 0 3.07-1.87 3.75-3.65 3.95.29.25.54.73.54 1.48 0 1.07-.01 1.93-.01 2.2 0 .21.15.46.55.38A8.013 8.013 0 0 0 16 8c0-4.42-3.58-8-8-8z"></path></svg>
    </span>
    <span class="package-card-title">More Projects</span>
    <span class="package-card-desc">See all repositories on GitHub</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
